default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential role for Ryan at GrowthX and explore alignment on marketing/community strategy](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX's marketing approach is similar to Reforge, focusing on community, content, and events to drive demand](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Ryan has relevant experience from Reforge and Foundation, aligning well with GrowthX's needs](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Both see rapid changes in marketing/SEO due to AI, creating opportunities for those who can adapt quickly](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)
  - [Ryan is actively job searching but not in a rush; salary expectations \~$155-170k](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Marketing Strategy

  - [Community, content, and events are key pillars](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Using signals from these to identify potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Aiming to create a "Reforge-like" flywheel but with added product/service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Charging $200-400/year for community access (60+ paid members so far)](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Looking to fill roles in events, marketing ownership, community management, and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### Ryan's Background and Interests

  - [Experience at Reforge and Foundation (Ross Simmonds' agency)](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Strong interest in "building in public" and connecting with other builders](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Currently doing AI/content engineering work, eager to upskill and move quickly](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
  - [Enjoys being the "face" of a brand, similar to Ryan Law at Ahrefs](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)

### Content Creation and Distribution Strategies

  - [Weekly job newsletters perform well on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Slide decks and visual content (e.g., workflow diagrams) are effective](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Mixing in 25% non-work content helps algorithm performance](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Engagement often higher in DMs than public likes/comments](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)

### AI and Marketing Tools

  - [Rapid changes in effective strategies and tools](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=2066.0)
  - [Shift towards agentic systems for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)
  - [Uncertainty about future of workflow tools like Airtable, Zapier, N8N](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)
  - [Ryan building custom solutions that rival expensive agency offerings](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)

### Reforge's Challenges

  - [High production costs for courses ($150k+ per course)](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Overinvested in production value vs. scalable model](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Shifted to subscription model, but unclear success](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to discuss with team about potential role/offer for Ryan](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Ryan to send examples of relevant work (e.g., teardowns) for team review](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)
  - [Consider possibility of initial contract work to test fit before full-time role](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=2296.0)
  - [Jason to follow up with Ryan on next steps and potential offer](https://fathom.video/share/mFx3ReEoXn4DxasQskbLjQ_4yATKUHmE?tab=summary&timestamp=2282.0)

action_items.description: Talk to team about Ryan McCready as potential hire for community/content role
Figure out what can be offered to Ryan in terms of position/compensation
Review Ryan's Notion page with old work samples, esp. teardowns for Foundation
Send Notion page with old work samples, incl. Foundation teardowns, to Jason
